extensionAttribute.scriptContentsMac:
#!/bin/bash
##################################### ## ## Pull user ID for Rust and add it to Jamf Inventory ## App needs to have been run for that part of the plist to be populated ## #####################################
#Set Current User
currentuser=`/bin/ls -l /dev/console | /usr/bin/awk '{ print $3 }'`
#Users RustDeskID
RustID=$(awk -F " |'" '($1 == "id") { print $(NF-1); exit }' /Users/$currentuser/Library/Preferences/com.carriez.RustDesk/RustDesk.toml)
echo "<result>$RustID</result>"
